ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Rename files automatically when their properties change (debounced). Off by default — use the command palette for manual renames.
ast.target: 当属性更改时自动重命名文件（防抖）。默认关闭 — 使用命令面板进行手动重命名。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Delay before auto-renaming after a property change. Avoids renaming on every keystroke.
ast.target: 属性更改后自动重命名前的延迟。避免每次击键都重命名。

ast.name: setDesc

ast.name: setDesc

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If set, only rename files whose frontmatter type matches this value.
ast.target: 如果设置，仅重命名 frontmatter 类型匹配此值的文件。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Rename all matching files in vault
ast.target: 重命名库中所有匹配的文件

ast.name: text
ast.source: Each rule applies to files in a folder (subfolders included). The template uses {{property}} placeholders that are replaced by frontmatter values. A file is renamed only when all referenced properties are non-empty.
ast.target: 每条规则适用于文件夹中的文件（包含子文件夹）。模板使用 {{property}} 占位符，这些占位符会被 frontmatter 值替换。仅当所有引用的属性都非空时，文件才会被重命名。
